form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== employeeId[员工] year[年份] month[月份] orgId[业务组织] businessDate[业务日期] =========>gross[应发项目]====== basicSalary[基本工资] positionAllowance[岗位津贴] performanceBonus[绩效奖金] overtimePay[加班费] mealAllowance[餐补] transportAllowance[交通补贴] otherAllowance[其他补贴] grossSalary[应发合计] =========>deduction[扣款项目]====== socialInsurance[社保个人部分] housingFund[公积金个人部分] taxAmount[个税] otherDeductions[其他扣款] =========>net[实发]====== netSalary[实发合计] =========>payment[支付信息]====== paymentStatus[支付状态] paymentDate[实发日期] paymentBatchNo[发放批次号] bankFileId[银行文件] =========>approval[审核信息]====== approveStatus[审核状态] approvedBy[审核人] approvedAt[审核时间] =========>posting[过账信息]====== posted[已过账] nopFlowId[工作流实例] =========>meta[计算要素]====== performanceFactor[绩效系数] actualWorkDays[实际出勤日] requiredWorkDays[应出勤日] totalOvertimeHours[月总加班小时] unpaidLeaveDays[无薪假天数] cumulativeData[累计个税数据] reviewNote[审核备注] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== employeeId[员工] year[年份] month[月份] orgId[业务组织] businessDate[业务日期] =========>gross[应发项目]====== basicSalary[基本工资] positionAllowance[岗位津贴] performanceBonus[绩效奖金] overtimePay[加班费] mealAllowance[餐补] transportAllowance[交通补贴] otherAllowance[其他补贴] grossSalary[应发合计] =========>deduction[扣款项目]====== socialInsurance[社保个人部分] housingFund[公积金个人部分] taxAmount[个税] otherDeductions[其他扣款] =========>net[实发]====== netSalary[实发合计] =========>payment[支付信息]====== paymentStatus[支付状态] paymentDate[实发日期] paymentBatchNo[发放批次号] bankFileId[银行文件] =========>approval[审核信息]====== approveStatus[审核状态] approvedBy[审核人] approvedAt[审核时间] =========>posting[过账信息]====== posted[已过账] nopFlowId[工作流实例] =========>meta[计算要素]====== performanceFactor[绩效系数] actualWorkDays[实际出勤日] requiredWorkDays[应出勤日] totalOvertimeHours[月总加班小时] unpaidLeaveDays[无薪假天数] cumulativeData[累计个税数据] reviewNote[审核备注] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注](2) createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: employeeId[员工] year[年份] month[月份] orgId[业务组织] paymentStatus[支付状态] approveStatus[审核状态]

action.label: 提交
action.confirmText: 确认提交此薪酬记录审批？

action.label: 撤回提交
action.confirmText: 确认撤回此薪酬记录的提交？撤回后单据将回到未提交状态，可重新编辑提交。

action.label: 反审批
action.confirmText: 确认反审批此薪酬记录？反审批后单据将回到驳回状态，可重新编辑提交。
